style_effects: Glowing molten lava cracks radiate from Pidgeot's wings and body, emitting intense heat shimmer that distorts the air around it; ember sparks float upward in a steady stream, crackling with crimson energy as they dissolve into the air. Its aura pulses with a vibrant orange-red hue, casting warm amber light that illuminates the surrounding area with a fiery glow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
